title: Legacy Potion of Strength
body:
Legacy Potion of Strength is a mod that brings back 1.9- strength potion effect
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3827d4da56401d3712f67410078cf387271dd82a.png)


> ## Adjustment
- Before: +(3 * level) damage
- After: +(1.3 * level * baseDamage) damage

> ## Compatibility
- [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector):  ✅
- Other Mods: 99% compatible (Almost no mods will edit vanilla potion effects, I think)
